driver_subject: net: dsa: hellcreek: Use the bitmap API to allocate bitmaps
stage1_reason: Change from manual bitmap allocation using devm_kcalloc + BITS_TO_LONGS to dedicated bitmap API devm_bitmap_zalloc
stage2_reason: Driver commit e7bde1c581e4 changes from devm_kcalloc + BITS_TO_LONGS to devm_bitmap_zalloc, matching kernel commit 9fbd8dc19aa5's introduction of bitmap_zalloc() API to replace manual bitmap allocation patterns.
